程序包 edu.bupt.ta.controller

package edu.bupt.ta.controller
  • 类
    类
    说明
    AdminDashboardServlet
    Displays the Admin dashboard: workload statistics and summary metrics.
    AdminServlet
    Central Admin controller handling all admin-panel routes.
    ApplicationStatusServlet
    Displays the current TA's submitted applications, enriched with job details (title, module code, organiser) via ApplicationWithJob.
    ApplyServlet
    Handles TA job application submissions.
    CandidateSummaryServlet
    Displays a structured candidate summary view for a TA's profile.
    CvDeleteServlet
    Handles deletion of the current TA's uploaded CV.
    CvUploadServlet
    Handles PDF CV file upload for the current TA.
    FileDownloadServlet
    Streams a TA's uploaded CV PDF to the browser.
    HomeServlet
    Home page controller.
    JobListServlet
    Lists all open jobs for the current TA, sorted by match score descending.
    LoginServlet
    Handles user login.
    LogoutServlet
    Destroys the current session and redirects to the home page.
    MOApplicationServlet
    Displays and manages applications for the logged-in MO's jobs.
    MODashboardServlet
    Displays the MO dashboard, showing only jobs created by the logged-in MO (matched by display name).
    MOJobServlet
    Handles MO job creation.
    RegisterServlet
    Handles TA registration.
    TaDashboardServlet
    Displays the TA dashboard for the current logged-in TA.
    TaProfileServlet
    Manages the TA profile page.
